Step light, or the sound sensors will pick up your vibration. Requires more than a simple wrench to open that hatch. Contacting the surface was impossible through the ionic storm. Via the auxiliary terminal, he sent a coded pulse. A flickering light signaled the connection was live. Secure lines are hard to find in the outer rim. Relay stations often go down during solar flares. Obtain the cargo before the patrol returns. A heavy crate sat in the middle of the hangar. Counterfeit seals were the only way to get it past the gate. Permit codes flashed green on the handheld scanner. To anyone watching, he looked like a simple dock worker. From here, the transport ship was only a few meters away. An old pilot sat in the cockpit, waiting for the signal. Underground routes through the nebula were dangerous but fast. Distributor marks on the side of the box were filed off. In the darkness, the ship's engines began to hum. The hull groaned as the stabilizers engaged. Sector police were still busy with the riots on the other side. Practicing
